compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for overlay classification checklist items in reviewer agents
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Modify tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh to add tests asserting that each built review agent contains security and performance overlay classification checklist items.

### Test approach
Run build-review-agents.sh, then for each generated agent file (code-reviewer-light.md, code-reviewer-standard.md, code-reviewer-deep-*.md), grep for the classification item text. Assert both security_overlay_warranted and performance_overlay_warranted items appear.

### Files to modify
- tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests run and FAIL (RED) — classification items not yet in delta files
  Verify: bash tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] Tests check all 6 built agent files for both classification items
  Verify: grep -c "security_overlay\|performance_overlay" tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — RED tests written and confirmed failing. .test-index RED markers set.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests written, committed in ba861337
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
